thread.section_title: The News International: Latest News Breaking, Pakistan News
thread.title: Buledi re-appointed GPA chief

author: @Our Correspondent
title: Buledi re-appointed GPA chief
text:
ISLAMABAD: The Prime Minister has re-appointed Pasand Khan Buledi as Chairman Gwadar Port Authority.
According to the notification issued by Establishment Division, Pasand Khan Buledi, a Grade-20 officer belonging to Balochistan Civil Service, has been re-appointed for four months. The appointment period will be counted from September 30 this year.
Meanwhile, six CDA officers have been appointed and transferred. Abdul Razaq, DG Vigilance, has been posted as DG Civic Management. He has also been given additional charge of Deputy DG Enforcement.
Habibullah Sheikh, DG Works, has been transferred and posted as DG Design.
Khalid Nawaz, who is awaiting appointment, has been posted as DG Vigilance. Khalid Mahmood Asif, DG Design, has been posted as DG Procurement and Contracts and Faisal Raza, Director Maintenance, appointed as DG Works. He will also continue to hold charge of Director Maintenance.
Ali Sheikh Mashooq, Director Sanitation and Sewerage, has been given additional charge of Director Central Engineering Laboratory.
Last episode of the drama will be aired on Saturday night at 8 pm
Majority of PTI’s central leadership also decided to dissociate itself from Bashari Bibi’s statement
Pakistan’s debt situation has been worsening since 2008, but deteriorated at speed never witnessed since 2019
Report warns that without immediate regulatory and policy action, these burdens will intensify
Ministry of Religious Affairs Section Officer Tariq Mahmood wrote letter to ETPB chairman regarding changes
He said frontline workers successfully vaccinated over 10.6 million children in recent campaigns
